code: import{configureStore}from"@reduxjs/toolkit";import authReducer from"./slices/auth";import messageReducer from"./slices/message";import storage from"redux-persist/lib/storage";import{persistStore,persistReducer,FLUSH,REHYDRATE,PAUSE,PERSIST,PURGE,REGISTER}from"redux-persist";var persistConfig={key:"root",version:1,storage:storage};var rootReducer=persistReducer(persistConfig,authReducer);var reducer={auth:authReducer};var store=configureStore({reducer:{user:rootReducer},middleware:function middleware(getDefaultMiddleware){return getDefaultMiddleware({serializableCheck:{ignoredActions:[FLUSH,REHYDRATE,PAUSE,PERSIST,PURGE,REGISTER]}});},devTools:true});export var persistor=persistStore(store);export default store;
